In query_db:14 the agent applied the “more than one case” filter to the non-transferred cases subset (owner_assignment_count = 1) rather than counting all processed cases (including transfers) as required by the policy, yielding an empty result and the final “No agent found” answer.

The agent concluded “no agent met the criteria” by grouping closed cases only on Case.ownerid (query_db:32) instead of using Owner Assignment records in casehistory__c to count all agents who processed cases (including transfers), so it selected the wrong data source for the “more than one case” filter and never computed average handle times.
